title: pasania javensis
intro: Pasania javensis, also known as the Indonesian Pasania or Pasania wood, is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pasania javensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Pasania javensis tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to alleviate various health conditions.
